slides.eyebrow: Mophato wa 11 Hisitori - Legato la FET
slides.title: Bosetshaba: Aforika Borwa, Botlhaba jo bo Gare le Aforika
slides.lead: Go bapisa mekgatlho e mene ya bosetshaba - bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere le jwa Maaforika kwa Aforika Borwa, le Zionism le bosetshaba jwa Maarabia kwa Botlhaba jo bo Gare - go botsa gore bosetshaba bo ka kopanya batho jang mme gape bwa kgaoganya lefatshe.

media.alt: Mefolakga e mene e e kgabisitsweng e phatsima go tswa mo lefatsheng le le fa gare, e emela mekgatlho e mene ya bosetshaba e e bapisiwang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='none' stroke='#4f5d3a' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='150'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='150'/></g><rect x='40' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='246' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#1f3a8a'/><rect x='40' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='246' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#2f5233'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlhalosa karolo yotlhe jaaka thuto ya papiso, e seng dikgang tse nne tse di farologaneng. Bua potso e kgolo ya hisitori: ke goreng bosetshaba - maatla a a nayang batho boitshupo, boikgantsho le kgololosego - a tlhola a baka kgethololo le kgotlhang gantsi jaana? Bontsha sebopego: pele tlhalosa bosetshaba, morago sekaseka dikgang tse pedi tsa Aforika Borwa (Maafrikanere le Maaforika), go tswa foo dikgang tse pedi tsa Botlhaba jo bo Gare (Zionism le bosetshaba jwa Maarabia), re bapisa fa re tsamaya. Gakolola baithuti gore bontlhanngwe jwa hisitori eno bo a ganetsanwa thata mme bo sa ntse bo ama maikutlo gompieno, ka jalo re tshwara didirisiwa ka tlhokomelo le ka tlotlo.

slides.title: Bosetshaba ke eng?
slides.lead: Bosetshaba ke tumelo ya gore setlhopha sa batho ba ba nang le boitshupo jo bo tshwanang bo bopa 'setshaba' se se tshwanelwang ke naga ya sona, boikanyego le boitaolo.

blocks.text: **Setshaba** ke *setshaba se se akanyediwang*: maloko a sona ga a kitla a kopana le bontsi jwa badudi ka bona, mme le fa go ntse jalo a ikutlwa a le mmogo. **Bosetshaba** bo fetola maikutlo ao go nna kopo ya sepolotiki - tshwanelo ya go ipusa mo nageng ya bona.

Boitseanape ba hisitori gantsi ba farologanya mefuta e mebedi. **Bosetshaba jwa bodudi** bo tlhalosa setshaba ka bodudi jo bo tshwanang, melao le mekgwa, ka jalo mongwe le mongwe a ka tsena. **Bosetshaba jwa morafe** bo bo tlhalosa ka losika lo lo tshwanang, puo, bodumedi kgotsa setso, mo go ka kgethololang ba kwa ntle. Mekgatlho e mentsi ya nnete e tlhakanya bobedi jwa yona.

items: Gantsi bo ikaega ka puo e e tshwanang, bodumedi, hisitori kgotsa kutlwalo ya bogologolo jo bo tshwanang.
Gantsi bo tsosiwa kgotsa bo thatafadiwa ke bohutsana jo bo tshwanang - go fenngwa, lehuma, kgethololo kgotsa puso ya baeng.
Bo aga kutlwano ka go tlhalosa 'rona', mme ka go dira jalo bo tlhalosa gape 'bone'.

slides.notes: Naya baithuti mareo a tokololo a ba tla a dirisang mo karolong yotlhe: setshaba, bosetshaba, boitaolo, bosetshaba jwa bodudi kgatlhanong le jwa morafe, le kgopolo ya ga Benedict Anderson ya 'setshaba se se akanyediwang'. Gatelela gore bosetshaba ga bo molemo fela kgotsa bosula fela - bo kgweeditse kgololosego kgatlhanong le bokoloni mme gape bo kgweeditse kgethololo le apartheid. Bokgoni jo bo rutwang ke papiso: kgopolo e le nngwe, maemo a a farologaneng.

slides.eyebrow: Ka fa o ka bapisang ka teng
slides.title: Dipotso tse tlhano tse o ka di botsang ka bosetshaba bongwe le bongwe
slides.lead: Dirisa leano le le tshwanang mo mokgatlhong mongwe le mongwe gore o kgone go a bapisa ka tshiamo.

blocks.heading: Mang?
blocks.text: Ke mang yo o balwang jaaka karolo ya setshaba - mme ke mang yo o setseng kwa ntle?

blocks.heading: Ke goreng jaanong?
blocks.text: Ke bohutsana kgotsa mathata afe a a tsositseng mokgatlho?

blocks.heading: Jang?
blocks.text: Baeteledipele ba kgobokantse batho jang - setso, bodumedi, mekgatlho, tiro ya bontsi?

blocks.heading: Lefatshe?
blocks.text: Ke kgaolo efe e ba neng ba e batla, mme ke mang yo mongwe yo o neng a e batla?

blocks.heading: Matswela?
blocks.text: A e tlisitse kgololosego, taolo, kgotlhang - kgotsa tsotlhe tse tharo?

slides.notes: Se ke sebopego sa papiso se baithuti ba tshwanetseng go se dirisa mo bosetshabeng jwa Maafrikanere, bosetshaba jwa Maaforika, Zionism le bosetshaba jwa Maarabia ka tatelano. Ba kgothaletse go boloka lenaneo la papiso mo dibukeng tsa bona le na le dikholomo tse tlhano. Bontsha gore potso ya 'Lefatshe?' ke fa dikgang tse pedi di nnang bohutsana teng: mo Aforika Borwa le mo Isiraele/Palesetina, bosetshaba jo bobedi bo ne bo batla kgaolo e le nngwe.

slides.title: Bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere: go fenngwa, lehuma le go tsosolosiwa
slides.lead: Bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere bo ne bo gola go tswa mo ditlhabisong ditlhong tsa Ntwa ya Aforika Borwa (1899-1902) le lehuma le Maafrikanere a mantsi a neng a lebana le lona morago ga foo.

blocks.text: Go fenngwa ke Boritane, loso lwa basadi le bana mo dikampeng tsa kgobokano, le tatlhegelo ya direpaboliki tsa Maburu, go ne go tlogela Maafrikanere a mantsi a ikutlwa gore volk (batho) ya bona e mo kotsing. Mo dingwageng tse di latelang dikete tsa masome a ne a nna 'basweu ba bahumanegi', ba kgorometswa go tswa mo mafatsheng go ya kwa metseng-selegae.

Baeteledipele ba dirisitse **puo, bodumedi le hisitori** go aga sesha boikgantsho. Seafrikanse se ne sa tlhomamisiwa le go godisiwa; Kereke ya Dutch Reformed e ne ya gatelela Maafrikanere jaaka batho ba ba tlhophilweng; mme kgang ya Leeto le Legolo (Great Trek) e ne ya nna nkgo ya tlholego ya batho ba ba lwelang kgololosego.

items: **Afrikaner Broederbond** (e e thailweng ka 1918) e ne ya aga letlhakore la sephiri go tsweletsa dikgatlhego tsa Maafrikanere mo dipolotiking, kgwebong le setsong.
Mekgatlho ya setso le keteko ya dingwaga di le lekgolo tsa Leeto le Legolo ka 1938 di ne tsa tsosa maikutlo a bontsi.
**National Party** e ne ya isa boitshupo jono mo maitekong a go tsaya taolo ya puso.

media.alt: Setshwantsho sa koloi ya dikgomo ka fa tlase ga letsatsi le le tlhatlogang, se gakolola Leeto le Legolo le le dirisiwang jaaka sesupo sa bosetshaba.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='170' cy='58' r='26' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#5a4a2a'><rect x='60' y='92' width='70' height='24'/><path d='M60 92 l14 -16 h44 l12 16 Z'/></g><circle cx='74' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='120' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='130' y1='104' x2='168' y2='100' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlhalosa ka fa kutlwalo ya go nna motswasetlhabelo e neng ya fetolwa go nna lenaneo la sepolotiki ka teng. Mokgwa wa botlhokwa: bohutsana (go fenngwa, lehuma la basweu ba bahumanegi) go akaretsa kgobokanyo ya setso (puo, kereke, nkgo ya hisitori, Broederbond) go tlhola mokgatlho wa bontsi. Keteko ya dingwaga di le lekgolo ya Leeto le Legolo ka 1938 ke sekai se se siameng sa ngwao e e dirilweng. [SME] Tshwara kgakologelo ya dikampe tsa kgobokano ka tlhokomelo le ka nnete; ke selo sa nnete mo hisitoring mme moragonyana se ne sa dirisiwa mo dipolotiking. Bontsha gore bono ke bosetshaba jwa morafe jo bo tlhalosiwang ka losika, puo le bodumedi.

slides.title: 1948: Bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere bo tshwara puso
slides.lead: Ka 1948 National Party e ne ya fenya maatla mme ya fetola bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere go nna pholisi ya semmuso ya apartheid.

blocks.text: E eteletswe pele ke **D.F. Malan**, National Party e ne ya fenya ditlhopho tsa 1948 tsa basweu fela ka tsholofetso ya *apartheid* ('go kgaogana'). Bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere jaanong bo ne bo laola puso mme bo e dirisa go sireletsa ditiro tsa Maafrikanere, puo le maatla - le go patelela taolo ya basweu mo bontsintsing jwa bantsho.

items: Puso e ne ya atolosa thuto ya Seafrikanse, tirelo ya setshaba le madirelo a a nang le puso go tsholetsa Maafrikanere.
Melao ya apartheid e ne ya arola batho ka morafe mme ya beela basweu maatla le ditshwanelo tse di kgethegileng.
Se ke kgang ya bosetshaba bo bo fitlheletseng boitaolo mo setlhopheng se le sengwe ka go bo ganela ba bangwe.

media.alt: Kerafo ya dibara e e tlhatlogang fa pele ga kago ya puso, e bontsha setlhopha se le sengwe se bona maatla ka ditshenyegelo tsa ba bangwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='36' width='120' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M54 36 q36 -22 72 0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='42' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='130' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><rect x='160' y='108' width='16' height='28'/><rect x='182' y='88' width='16' height='48'/><rect x='204' y='60' width='16' height='76'/></g><rect x='28' y='136' width='196' height='6' fill='#5a4a2a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ntsha ntlha ya tokololo sentle: bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere bo ne bo 'atlega' ka 1948, mme katlego ya bona e ne e le kgatelelo ya batho ba bangwe. Se se baya kgotlhang e e tlhamaletseng le bosetshaba jwa Maaforika. Boa go golaganya le sebopego: Ke mang yo o neng a akareditswe? (Maafrikanere, morago basweu.) Ke mang yo o neng a kgethilwe kwa ntle? (Bontsintsi jwa bantsho.) Ela tlhoko gore apartheid e ne e le bontlhanngwe porojeke ya go tlhama ditiro le go tsholetsa Maafrikanere a bahumanegi, se se thusang go tlhalosa gore ke goreng e ne e kgatlhisa setshaba sa yona.

slides.title: Bosetshaba jwa Maaforika: kutlwano kgatlhanong le kgethololo
slides.lead: Bosetshaba jwa Maaforika bo ne bo gola jaaka karabo mo phenyong, tatlhegelong ya lefatshe le kgethololong go tswa mo Kopanong ya Aforika Borwa e e neng ya bopiwa ka 1910.

blocks.text: Kopano ya Aforika Borwa (1910) e ne ya kopanya basweu mme ya tswalela Maaforika kwa ntle ga maatla a sepolotiki. Ka 1912 baeteledipele ba Maaforika ba ba rutegileng ba ne ba tlhoma **South African Native National Congress** - e e neng ya bidiwa sesha **African National Congress (ANC)** ka 1923 - go kopanya Maaforika go ralala merafe le dikgaolo le go batla ditshwanelo mo setshabeng se le sengwe se se tshwanang.

**Natives Land Act ya 1913**, e e neng ya beela basweu bontsi jwa lefatshe la naga, e ne ya bontsha gore ke goreng kutlwano e ne e le potlako. Bosetshaba jwa Maaforika jwa pele bo ne bo le bonolo: bo ne bo dirisa dikopo, boemedi le molao go rapelela go akarediwa.

items: Bo ne bo ikaeletse go fenya dikgaogano tsa merafe le go aga setshaba se le sengwe sa Aforika, mme moragonyana se se senang semorafe, sa Aforika Borwa.
Bo ne bo tlhalosa setshaba ka bodudi jo bo tshwanang le ditshwanelo - pono e e gaisang ya bodudi.
Mekgwa ya bona ya pele e ne e le ya molaotheo; go tenega go ne go tla bo kgweetsa moragonyana go ya kwa tirong ya bontsi.

media.alt: Ditshwantsho tse dintsi tse dinnye tsa dibopego tse di farologaneng di tshwaragana diatla go bopa sedikwa se le sengwe, di tshwantshetsa kutlwano go ralala ditlhopha.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='120' cy='40' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='62' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='120' cy='130' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='62' r='11'/></g><circle cx='120' cy='85' r='52' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' stroke-dasharray='6 6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bapisa mabaka a tlholego le bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere: bosetshaba jwa Maaforika bo ne bo batla go aga kutlwano go ralala ditlhopha tse dintsi tsa merafe ya Maaforika (Bazulu, Baxhosa, Basotho le ba bangwe) tota go ganetsa puso e e neng ya ba kgetholola. Gatelela pono e e gaisang ya bodudi, e e akaretsang - kwa bofelong ANC e ne ya elela kwa go se-nang-semorafe. Ela tlhoko go sokamela mo karolo e nnang e boela go gona: bosetshaba jo bobedi jwa Aforika Borwa, bo bongwe bo batla taolo, bo bongwe bo batla go akarediwa, di thulana ka lefatshe le le tshwanang.

slides.title: Kokomana e ntsha: ANC Youth League
slides.lead: Ka bo-1940 kokomana e e nnye e ne ya batla bosetshaba jwa Maaforika jo bo pelokgale, jo bo theilweng mo bontsing.

blocks.text: Ba tenegile ke dingwaga di le dintsi tsa dikopo tse di boikokobetso, baeteledipele ba basha ba ne ba bopa **ANC Youth League** ka 1944. Moporesidente wa yona wa ntlha, **Anton Lembede**, o ne a ngangisana gore Maaforika a tshwanetse go ikgolola ka boikgantsho, boitshepo le go ikgobokanya ka bontsi go na le go leta boitshwaro jo bo molemo jwa basweu.
Aforika ke naga ya monna montsho... Maaforika ke bongwe. Go tswa mo merafeng e e farologaneng go tshwanetse go tlhaga setshaba se se tshwanang.
blocks.cite: Anton Lembede, 'Some Basic Principles of African Nationalism', 1945

items: Programme of Action ya Youth League ya 1949 e ne ya amogela diteraeke, diboikoto le kganetso ya melao ka kagiso.
Batho ba ba jaaka Nelson Mandela, Walter Sisulu le Oliver Tambo ba ne ba tlhatloga ka maemo a yona.
Bosetshaba jono jo bo tiileng jwa Maaforika bo ne bo tla kgweetsa ntwa ya bontsi kgatlhanong le apartheid ka bo-1950.

slides.notes: Dirisa nopolo ya ga Lembede go bontsha bothati jwa maikutlo jwa bosetshaba jwa Maaforika - boitshepo le kutlwano go ralala merafe - fa o ela tlhoko gore ngwao e kgolo ya ANC le yona e ne ya elela kwa go se-nang-semorafe (moragonyana Freedom Charter). [SME] Boaforika jwa ga Lembede e ne e le lotlhakore lo le longwe; ANC e ne e na le ngangisano fa gare ga Boaforika jo bo kgethollang le go se-nang-semorafe jo bo akaretsang, mo moragonyana bo neng bwa tlhola go kgaogana ga PAC (1959). Boloka pharologano: bosetshaba jwa Maaforika bo ne bo se bongwe fela. Golaganya kwa pele: kokomana eno e eteletse pele Defiance Campaign e Mophato wa 9 o e rutileng.

slides.title: Bosetshaba jo bobedi, naga e le nngwe
slides.lead: Bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere le jwa Maaforika bo ne bo gola ka fa thoko ga bo bongwe, bongwe le bongwe bo bopa jo bongwe.

items: Bo theilwe mo go fenngweng ke Boritane le lehuma la basweu ba bahumanegi.
Semorafe: bo tlhalosiwa ka losika, Seafrikanse le kereke.
Maikaelelo: go ipusa le tshireletso ya volk ya Maafrikanere.
Bo fentse puso ka 1948 mme bo aga apartheid.
Bo fitlheletse kgololosego ka bosona ka go laola ba bangwe.
Bo theilwe mo phenyong, tatlhegelong ya lefatshe le kgethololong.
Maikaelelo a bodudi: go kopanya ditlhopha tse dintsi go nna setshaba se le sengwe.
Maikaelelo: ditshwanelo tse di lekanang le go ipusa ga bontsi.
Bo ne bwa fetogela mo ntweng ya bontsi go tloga ka bo-1940 go bo-1950.
Bo ne bo batla kgololosego ka go akarediwa, e seng ka taolo.

slides.notes: Ema fano go dira tiro ya papiso e e rulagantsweng. Kopa baithuti go supa ditshwanelo (bobedi jwa bona bo dirisitse hisitori, setso le mokgatlho go kgobokanya; bobedi jwa bona bo ne bo batla boitaolo) le dipharologano (bo bongwe bo kgethollang mme bo busa, bo bongwe bo akaretsang mme bo kgethilwe kwa ntle). Gatelela tirisano: kgatelelo ya bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere e ne ya tsosolosa bosetshaba jwa Maaforika, mme kganetso ya Maaforika e ne ya thatafatsa bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere. Go bopana gono ga mmogo ke temogo ya maemo a a kwa godimo ya botlhokwa mo FET.

slides.title: Zionism: naga ya bogae ya batho ba Bajuda
slides.lead: Zionism e ne e le mokgatlho wa bosetshaba o o neng o batla naga ya bogae ya Bajuda, bogolo jaaka karabo mo dingwageng di le makgolo tsa pogiso kwa Yuropa.

blocks.text: A lebane le kilo ya Bajuda e e bogale - dipolao (pogroms) mo Mmusomogolong wa Russia le Dreyfus Affair kwa Fora - **Theodor Herzl** o ne a ngangisana mo *The Jewish State* (1896) gore Bajuda ba tla bo ba babalesegile fela fa ba na le puso ya bona. Kokoano ya Ntlha ya Zionist e ne ya kopana kwa Basel ka 1897, mme go falola ga Bajuda go ya Palesetina ga gola.

Mo **Balfour Declaration (1917)** Boritane bo ne bwa itsise tshegetso ya 'legae la setshaba la batho ba Bajuda' mo Palesetina - lefatshe le ka nako eo le neng le tletse Maarabia thata. Boritane bo ne bwa busa Palesetina ka fa tlase ga taolo ya League of Nations morago ga 1920, mme dikgotlhang fa gare ga baagi ba Bajuda le Maarabia tsa oketsega.

items: Zionism e ne ya tlhakanya boitshupo jwa morafe le jwa bodumedi le kopo ya sešeng ya go nna naga.
E ne e kgweediwa ke pogiso ya nnete e e bolayang, bogolo segolo Holocaust ya 1941-1945.
Mme lefatshe le e neng e le batla e ne e setse e le legae la baagi ba Maarabia ba ba nang le maikutlo a bona a bosetshaba.

media.alt: Naledi e e nang le dintlha di le thataro ka fa godimo ga molelwane wa lefatshe o o kgabisitsweng, e emela pitso ya Zionist ya naga ya bogae ya Bajuda.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='none' stroke='#1f3a8a' stroke-width='6' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M120 34 L146 94 L86 58 L154 58 L94 94 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Tlhagisa Zionism jaaka karabo mo pogisong ya nnete, e e bolayang, e e felelang ka Holocaust - baithuti ba tshwanetse go tlhaloganya gore ke goreng Bajuda ba bantsi ba ne ba swetsa gore ba tlhoka puso ya bona. Ka nako e le nngwe, nna phepafalo ka dinnete gore Palesetina e ne e setse e agilwe, bontsi ke Maarabia, ka jalo lefatshe le le tshwanang le ne le na le dikopo tse pedi. [SME] Eno ke hisitori e e tlhwaafalang thata e e ganetsanwang; itshwaraganye le dinnete tse di dumelanwang thata (Herzl, Basel 1897, Balfour 1917, British Mandate) mme o tila go tsaya letlhakore. Supa go sekaseka didirisiwa: Balfour Declaration le yona e ne ya solofetsa go se gobatse ditshwanelo tsa 'baagi ba e seng Bajuda ba ba leng gona'.

slides.title: 1948: boipuso le masetlapelo
slides.lead: Tiragalo e le nngwe ya 1948 e gakologelwa ke merafe e mebedi ka ditsela tse di farologaneng.

blocks.text: Morago ga Holocaust le kgotlhang e e golang, Ditshaba tse di Kopaneng (United Nations) di ne tsa boutela ka 1947 go kgaoganya Palesetina go nna naga ya Bajuda le ya Maarabia. Ka **14 May 1948** baeteledipele ba Bajuda ba ne ba itsise **State of Israel**. Ntwa le dinaga tsa boagisani tsa Maarabia ya latela ka bonako.

Ba-Isiraele ba gakologelwa 1948 jaaka **Ntwa ya bona ya Boipuso** - go fitlhelela naga ya bogae e e babalesegileng. Ba-Palesetina ba e gakologelwa jaaka **Nakba** ('masetlapelo'): go fopholediwa Maarabia a Palesetina a a ka nnang 700 000 a tshabile kgotsa a lelekilwe mme a se ka a letlelelwa go boa. Lefatshe le le lengwe, merafe e mebedi, dikgakologelo tse pedi tse di sa kgoneng go dumelana.

items: Mo setshabeng se le sengwe, 1948 e ne e raya boitaolo le go falola.
Mo go se sengwe, e ne e raya go amogiwa le botshabelo.
Kgotlhang eno e e sa rarabololwang e sa ntse e bopa Botlhaba jo bo Gare gompieno.

media.alt: Kgaolo e le nngwe e e kgaogantsweng ke mola o o emeng, letlhakore le lengwe le tlhatloga mme le lengwe le tsamaya, di tshwantshetsa dikgakologelo tse pedi tse di farologaneng tsa 1948.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='16' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='128' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#d8c6a8'/><rect x='116' y='24' width='8' height='112' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#1f3a8a'><path d='M64 60 L74 84 L54 70 L86 70 L66 84 Z'/></g><g fill='#5a4a2a'><circle cx='160' cy='72' r='7'/><rect x='153' y='80' width='14' height='24'/><path d='M172 88 h22 l-8 -8 v16 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Eno ke selaete se se tlhwaafalang go feta tsotlhe mo pampitshaneng; e rute jaaka thuto ya pono le kgakologelo ya hisitori. Tlhagisa maina oomabedi a 1948 ka fa thoko ga a mangwe ntle le go a beela maemo, mme dirisa puo ya 'e gakologelwa jaaka'. [SME] Dipalo le mabaka a go tswa ga Ba-Palesetina di ganetsanwa tota ke boitseanape ba hisitori (go tshaba kgotsa go lelekwa); tlhagisa palo ya ~700 000 jaaka tekanyetso mme o ele tlhoko ngangisano. Maikaelelo a go ruta ke kutlwelobotlhoko le go sekaseka didirisiwa: tiragalo e le nngwe ya letlha e tlhola dikanego tse pedi tsa bosetshaba. Laletsa puisano e e ritibetseng, e e nang le tlotlo mme o baye melao ya motheo pele.

slides.eyebrow: Botlhaba jo bo Gare / Aforika - kgang 4
slides.title: Bosetshaba jwa Maarabia: kutlwano le boipuso
slides.lead: Bosetshaba jwa Maarabia bo ne bo batla go golola merafe e e buang Searabia mo pusong ya baeng mme, mo go bangwe, go a kopanya go nna setshaba se le sengwe.

blocks.text: Fa Mmusomogolo wa Ottoman o wa morago ga Ntwa ya Ntlha ya Lefatshe, mafatshe a Maarabia a ne a kgaoganngwa go nna ditaolo tsa Boritane le Fora. Basetshaba ba Maarabia ba ne ba ila taolo eno ya baeng le melelwane e e neng e thadilwe ke Maeropa, mme ba ntse ba ganetsa go aga ga Zionist mo Palesetina.

Mokgatlho o ne wa fitlha kwa godimo ka fa tlase ga **Gamal Abdel Nasser** wa Egepeto. Fa Nasser a **dira Suez Canal ya puso ka 1956** mme a lebana le tlhaselo ya Boritane, Fora le Isiraele, o ne a nna mogaka mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Maarabia le sesupo sa mekgatlho e e ganetsang bokoloni go ralala Aforika le Asia.

items: Bo ne bo agilwe mo puong e e tshwanang ya Searabia, setso le (mo go bantsi) Isilamo.
**Pan-Arabism** e ne e lora go kopanya Maarabia otlhe, e kopanya Egepeto le Siria ka nakwana ka 1958.
Bo ne bo ganetsa bokoloni ka thata mme bo tlhotlheletsa dintwa tsa boipuso tsa Aforika.

media.alt: Ketane e e robegileng ka fa godimo ga mokoloko o o kgabisitsweng, e emela bosetshaba jwa Maarabia jo bo ganetsang bokoloni le Mathata a Suez.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='104' y='30' width='32' height='108' fill='#4f7fae'/><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='72' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='96' cy='72' r='14'/></g><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='168' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='144' cy='72' r='14'/></g><line x1='108' y1='66' x2='132' y2='66' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-dasharray='4 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bontsha bosetshaba jwa Maarabia jaaka mokgatlho o mongwe o o ganetsang bokoloni, o o golaganyang kgang ya Botlhaba jo bo Gare le Aforika (setlhogo sa CAPS se akaretsa oomabedi). Nasser le Suez 1956 ke ntlhakgolo: maatla a mannye a a ganetsang beng ba maloba ba bokoloni a ne a tsosa lefatshe le le tswang mo bokoloning, go akaretsa Aforika e e kwa borwa jwa Sahara. Ela tlhoko kgatelelo mo bosetshabeng jwa Maarabia fa gare ga kutlwano ya pan-Arab le dinaga tse di farologaneng, le gore go ganetsa Zionism e ne e le nngwe ya mabaka a a kopanyang. Golaganya maatla a go ganetsa bokoloni le bosetshaba jwa Maaforika jo bo ithutilweng pele.

slides.title: Bosetshaba jo bobedi, lefatshe le le lengwe
slides.lead: Jaaka Aforika Borwa, Botlhaba jo bo Gare bo ne bwa bona bosetshaba jo bobedi bo batla kgaolo e le nngwe.

items: Karabo mo kilong ya Bajuda ya Yuropa le Holocaust.
Semorafe-bodumedi: naga ya bogae ya batho ba Bajuda.
Maikaelelo: puso ya Bajuda e e babalesegileng mo Palesetina.
Bo fitlheletse bonaga ka 1948 (Isiraele).
Katlego ya bona e ne ya suthisa baagi ba Maarabia a Palesetina.
Karabo mo go weng ga Ottoman le puso ya bokoloni ya Yuropa.
Bo theilwe mo puong e e tshwanang ya Searabia le setso.
Maikaelelo: boipuso le (mo go bangwe) kutlwano ya Maarabia.
Bo ne bwa fitlha kwa godimo le Nasser le Mathata a Suez a 1956.
Bo ne bwa ganetsa Zionism mme bwa tlhotlheletsa Aforika e e ganetsang bokoloni.

slides.notes: Dira tiro e le nngwe ya papiso jaaka mo selaeteng sa Aforika Borwa. Morago dira kgolagano magareng ga dikgang e nne phepa: Aforika Borwa le Palesetina oomabedi ba bontsha bosetshaba jo bobedi bo thulana ka kgaolo e le nngwe, bo tlhola kgotlhang e e telele, e e botlhoko. Kopa baithuti go bapisa e seng fela Zionism kgatlhanong le bosetshaba jwa Maarabia, mme le bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere kgatlhanong le Zionism (oomabedi ke dipalo tse dinnye tse di batlang tshireletsego le taolo) le bosetshaba jwa Maaforika kgatlhanong le bosetshaba jwa Maarabia (oomabedi ke mekgatlho ya bontsi e e ganetsang bokoloni). Papiso eno ya matlhakore a mane ke tota kakanyo ya maemo a a kwa godimo e CAPS e e duelang.

slides.title: Bosetshaba: maatla a a kopanyang le a a kgaoganyang
slides.lead: Go ralala dikgang tsotlhe tse nne, bosetshaba bo ne bwa naya batho boitshupo le kgololosego - mme bwa thala mela e e neng ya isa kwa kgotlhang.

blocks.alt: Lenaneo la nako la matshwao a botlhokwa a bosetshaba go tloga ka 1897 go ya go 1958 go ralala Aforika Borwa le Botlhaba jo bo Gare.

events.label: Kokoano ya Ntlha ya Zionist, Basel
SANNC (moragonyana ANC) e thailwe mo Aforika Borwa
Balfour Declaration ka 'legae la setshaba' la Bajuda
ANC Youth League e tsosolosa bosetshaba jwa Maaforika
National Party e fenya maatla; State of Israel e itsisiwe / Nakba
Nasser le Mathata a Suez: setlhoa sa bosetshaba jwa Maarabia

slides.notes: Kopanya ka lenaneo leno la nako le le tshwanang gore baithuti ba bone mekgatlho e mene e tswelela mo nakong e le nngwe, e tlhotlheletsana (go ganetsa bokoloni go anamisitse dikakanyo go ralala melelwane). Ntsha ngangisano ya bofelo: bosetshaba ke maatla a a nang le magale a mabedi - bo ne bwa kgweetsa kgololosego mo bokoloning le apartheid, mme kwa merafe e mebedi e neng e batla lefatshe le le lengwe teng bo ne bwa tlhola go amogiwa le kgotlhang e e nnelang ruri. Ela tlhoko 1948 jaaka ngwaga o o kgethegileng o o tlhagang mo dikgang tse pedi tse di farologaneng ka nako e le nngwe.

slides.title: Tshekatsheko: go bapisa bosetshaba
slides.lead: Dirisa sebopego sa dipotso tse tlhano le dipapiso go araba dipotso tse di fa tlase.

blocks.text: Mo thutong eno re ne ra tlhalosa bosetshaba, ra farologanya bosetshaba jwa **bodudi** le jwa **morafe**, mme ra bapisa mekgatlho e mene: bosetshaba jwa **Maafrikanere** le jwa **Maaforika** kwa Aforika Borwa, le **Zionism** le bosetshaba jwa **Maarabia** kwa Botlhaba jo bo Gare. Mo dikgaolong tsoopedi bosetshaba jo bobedi bo ne bo batla lefatshe le le tshwanang, ka ditlamorago tse di fitlhang kgakala.

blocks.question: Tlhalosa pharologano fa gare ga bosetshaba jwa bodudi le jwa morafe, o dirisa sekai SE LE SENGWE sa Aforika Borwa le SE LE SENGWE sa Botlhaba jo bo Gare.
Bapisa metswedi ya bosetshaba jwa Maafrikanere le bosetshaba jwa Maaforika. Umaka bonnye ditshwanelo tse pedi le dipharologano tse pedi.

'Ditiragalo tsa 1948 di ne di raya kgololosego mo setshabeng se le sengwe le tatlhegelo mo go se sengwe.' O dirisa sekai sa Aforika Borwa KGOTSA sa Isiraele-Palesetina, tlotla ka fa tiragalo e le nngwe ya hisitori e ka gakologelwang ka ditsela tse di farologaneng ka teng.

slides.notes: Dirisa dipotso tse tharo jaaka tiro e e kwadilweng kgotsa ngangisano ya tlelase e e rulagantsweng; kabo ya maduo e etsa mekgwa ya CAPS ya go kwala mo go atolositsweng le e e theilweng mo didirisiweng. Potso 3 e sekaseka ka tlhamalalo bokgoni jwa go tlhaloganya kgakologelo le pono tse di ganetsanwang, tse di leng bothati mo setlhogong seno. Gakolola baithuti go ngangisana go tswa mo bosuping le go emela letlhakore lengwe le lengwe ka tshiamo. [SME] Pele o sekaseka didiriswa tsa Isiraele/Palesetina, netefatsa gore kaelo ya lefapha ya go ruta setlhogo seno se se ganetsanwang e latetswe le gore go neelwa didirisiwa tse di farologaneng.
